description:
The SizeModifier component modifies the size of particles as an extra effect on top of existing size modifiers.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Multiplier: How much to multiply the size of all particles.
fields.Offset: How much to add to the size of all particles.
fields.SizeClampMin: The minimum size particles can be.
fields.SizeClampMax: The maximum size particles can be.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
